misc_summary: This file contains only advertisements and publication information: LDS garment advertisements from Moses Lewis and Salt Lake Knitting Store, Utah Oil Refining Company (Pep 88/Vico) ad, table of contents for April 1936 issue, publisher/subscription information, and various other business advertisements (Granite Furniture, Fisher's Bread, Bennett Paint, Deseret Book Company, Brigham Young University Summer Session, etc.). No standalone articles, poems, or editorial content to extract.
